name: Easy Baked Ziti
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef and drain excess fat.
2. Add tomato sauce, tomato paste, spaghetti sauce mix, and garlic to a large pot. Simmer about 15 minutes.
3. Pour the mixture over the cooked pasta in a greased casserole dish.
4. Spread half of the pasta mixture with mozzarella cheese on top.
5. Pour remaining pasta mixture into the dish.
6. Sprinkle remaining mozzarella and Parmesan cheese on top.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 40 minutes, or until bubbly and golden brown.
Source: FOM Food
